name: dragapult
flavor_texts: When it isn’t battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes on its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles.
Apparently the Dreepy inside Dragapult’s horns eagerly look forward to being launched out at Mach speeds.
text: Dragapult is the Stealth Pokémon. It is a dragon and ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: clear-body, infiltrator, cursed-body (hidden). Base stats — HP: 88, Attack: 120, Defense: 75, Sp. Atk: 100, Sp. Def: 75, Speed: 142. Evolution line: dreepy → drakloak → dragapult. Lore: When it isn’t battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes on its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles. Apparently the Dreepy inside Dragapult’s horns eagerly look forward to being launched out at Mach speeds.
